note: HIGH PRIORITY — live excerpt was raw CSS junk, now fixed. Sidebar (Agent 1) populated using pre-existing verified draft (out/zilina-zavodie.timeline.json, batch 28) after re-checking every item against body + correcting 3 issues found during verification. All criticalFixes + appliedFixes from grammar-sk-pass2.json applied. Cross-field sweep clean.

sidebar.note: Re-used out/zilina-zavodie.timeline.json (pre-existing Agent-1 draft) after verifying every item against blogPost.blocks body text. Corrected 3 issues found during verification: (1) '5.–6. storočie' missing spaces around en dash — fixed to '5. – 6. storočie' to match body; (2) 1923 entry cited '(Bratislava 1923)' — 'Bratislava' as place of publication is NOT stated anywhere in body, so it was removed (no external knowledge); (3) keyFact 'Funkcia hradiska' still said 'útočištné' — updated to 'útočiskové' to match the A7 bohemizmus fix applied to body. Added 1 new keyFact ('Susedné opevnenia', sourced from block 3 listing neighbouring hillforts) to round out density to 8.

criticalFixesApplied.issue: Live `excerpt` field was raw CSS junk: 'p { margin-bottom: 0.25cm; ... }p.western {...}p.cjk {...}' — no readable text at all. This was broken on the live site.
criticalFixesApplied.fix: Replaced with a clean excerpt built from the opening of body block 0 (Toto zaujímavé žilinské hradisko... Dvíha sa spod Žiliny smerom k Hričovu…).

criticalFixesApplied.issue: Image captions/alt for obr.4.jpg (block 5) and obr.5.jpg (block 7) had raw CSS junk prefixed before the real caption text; the `alt` fields were CSS truncated mid-string with no real text at all.
criticalFixesApplied.fix: CSS stripped from both blocks' caption AND alt (alt set to the same clean caption text, consistent with the alt=caption convention used elsewhere in this article).

criticalFixesApplied.issue: Gallery items matching obr.4.jpg and obr.5.jpg (gallery[1], gallery[2]) had the same CSS junk in their `caption` field.
criticalFixesApplied.fix: Cleaned to match the fixed body captions.

criticalFixesApplied.issue: Gallery item obr.6.JPG (gallery[4], not referenced in body) had the same CSS junk plus 'n.l.' missing a space.
criticalFixesApplied.fix: Cleaned to 'Zlomky nádob púchovskej kultúry z 1. stor. pred n. l.'

criticalFixesApplied.issue: content.sources.items had 11 entries — 1 real bibliography (Moravčík 2015) + 10 duplicates of gallery photo captions (pohľad na západnú časť opevnenia, predný malý val..., etc., all already present verbatim in gallery[] with their own real captions). Same 10 duplicates also existed in top-level citations[] (12 entries total there, incl. the 'Článok prevzatý z :' intro).
criticalFixesApplied.fix: Removed all 10 duplicate items from both content.sources.items and citations[]. Kept + reformatted the single real bibliography entry: 'MORAVČÍK, J.: Niektoré opevnenia v centrálnej časti Žilinskej kotliny. In: Hradiská – Svedkovia dávnych čias. Dolná Mariková 2015.' Also fixed stray space-before-colon in intro ('Článok prevzatý z :' → 'Článok prevzatý z:').

appliedFromPass2.after: svojou rozlohou asi 6 ha je podobné

skipped: 'Autor textu: Mgr. Jozef Moravčík' na konci bloku 6 ponechané bez zmeny — atribúcia tretej strany, nejednoznačný prípad na odstránenie (rovnako ako v pass2).
flags: R. Zaymusa/Zauymusa — meno opravené na základe zhody s pôvodným (pass2-schváleným) timeline draftom, nie externe overené. Ak sa objaví pôvodný zdroj (Sborník Muzeálnej slovenskej spoločnosti, 1900), over správny tvar.
